title: Simply Zombies
description: Spice up your world with more colorful and biome-dependent zombies!
body:
### Simply Zombies

Make zombies interesting again and get killed in style by 80* variants of zombies!

*Number may be different depending on the version

### Dependecies

This pack requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)!


- - -
![Zombie Showcase](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/LbHbkVC8/images/0a2b1d55383ed02afd13d7ad4e2adffffa41d479.png)
- - -
### Contribute

Want to improve the pack?\
Or just a place to chat?\
Then make sure to join my discord server!
